mapper.select: SELECT CHAT_NO , C.USER_ID , U.USER_NAME , F.FILE_PATH , B.TITLE , C.JOIN_NO , C.CONTENT , C.CREATE_DATE , C.UPDATED , C.DELETED FROM JOIN_CHAT C JOIN PLOGUES_USER U ON C.USER_ID = U.USER_ID LEFT JOIN USER_FILE F ON C.USER_ID = F.USER_ID JOIN JOIN_BOARD B ON C.JOIN_NO = B.JOIN_NO WHERE C.JOIN_NO = #{joinNo} AND C.DELETED = 'N' ORDER BY C.CHAT_NO DESC
SELECT CHAT_NO , USER_ID , JOIN_NO , CREATE_DATE , UPDATED , DELETED FROM JOIN_CHAT WHERE CHAT_NO = #{chatNo} AND DELETED = 'N'
mapper.update: UPDATE JOIN_CHAT SET UPDATED = 'Y', CONTENT = #{content} WHERE CHAT_NO = #{chatNo}
UPDATE JOIN_CHAT SET DELETED = 'Y' WHERE CHAT_NO = #{chatNo}
